title: braya aenea var. limosella
intro: Braya aenea var. limosella is a rare and unique plant species, also known as Arctic braya or mountain avens, which belongs to the Brassicaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of Braya aenea var. limosella include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
